fields.title: Getting Started
fields.content:
# Getting Started

Welcome to **Cobblemon Returns**! This guide will help you join the server and start your Pokémon adventure.

## Connecting

Use the server address: `play.gabrielafonso.com.br`

Make sure you have the modpack installed before connecting.

## Your First Pokémon

When you first spawn, a starter Pokémon will appear. Choose wisely — you can only pick once!

## Catching Pokémon

Pokémon spawn naturally in the world. Use Poké Balls to catch them:

1. Craft or buy Poké Balls
2. Weaken the wild Pokémon in battle
3. Throw the ball and hope for the best

## Commands

- `/pokebox` — open your PC storage
- `/pokedex` — view your Pokédex progress
- `/baltop` — check the CobbleDollars leaderboard

fields.title: Modpack Installation
fields.content:
# Modpack Installation

Follow these steps to install the Cobblemon Returns modpack.

## Using CurseForge

1. Download and install the [CurseForge](https://curseforge.com) launcher
2. Search for **Cobblemon Returns** in the modpack browser
3. Click **Install** and wait for the download to finish
4. Launch the profile and connect to the server

## Using Modrinth

1. Download and install the [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com) launcher
2. Search for **Cobblemon Returns**
3. Install and launch

## Manual Installation

If you prefer manual installation:

- Install **Fabric** for Minecraft 1.20.1
- Download all required mods from the modlist page
- Place them in your `.minecraft/mods` folder

> **Note:** Make sure all mod versions match exactly to avoid crashes.

fields.title: Economy Guide
fields.content:
# Economy Guide

Cobblemon Returns uses **CobbleDollars** as its currency.

## Earning CobbleDollars

- Winning Pokémon battles
- Selling items at the player market
- Completing daily quests
- Trading with other players

## Spending CobbleDollars

- Buy rare Pokémon from the market
- Purchase CobbleTCG card packs
- Unlock cosmetic items
- Buy building materials

## CobbleTCG

The server features a custom trading card game. Cards can be:

- Found as world drops
- Won in battles
- Purchased in the card shop
- Traded between players

Check the `/rankings` page to see who has the largest card collection!
